name: Date With Saie
overview: Date with Saie is a ZEE5 Original starring Sai Tamhankar. The story revolves around a popular actress who is stalked by a maniac fan, who places cameras to track her every move and make a film on her life. What happens when Saie discovers about the cameras and the crazy fan posing a threat to her private life.

trailers.title: Date with Saie | Official Trailer | Marathi ZEE5 Original Movie | Saie Tamhankar | Watch Now on ZEE5
